sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM I_INFOTIMELINE_T WHERE VALIDFLAG > 0
INFOID = $infoid$
infoAnnotationid = $infoAnnotationid$
infoAssign = $infoAssign$
assignSignfor = $assignSignfor$
(informationsendid like '%$informationsendid$%')
ORDER BY ID desc
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO I_INFOTIMELINE_T (infoid,informationsendid,informationreceiveid,title,content,addtime,validflag,infoAnnotationid,infoAssign,assignSignfor) VALUES ($infoid$,$informationsendid$,'$informationreceiveid$','$title$','$content$','$addtime$',1,$infoAnnotationid$,$infoAssign$,$assignSignfor$) SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM I_INFOTIMELINE_T WHERE VALIDFLAG > 0 and infoAssign = $infoAssign$
assignSignfor = $assignSignfor$
order by id desc
